title: GenericCounter Class for Hadoop MapReduce
description: The GenericCounter.java file defines a class that extends AbstractCounter in Apache Hadoop MapReduce. This class is responsible for managing counter data fields, including name, display name, and value. It implements core logic for reading and writing counter data using DataInput and DataOutput. The class includes methods to increment, get, and set the counter's value. Dependencies include various Hadoop and Java libraries for input/output operations and exception handling. This class plays a crucial role in tracking and managing job counters within the Hadoop MapReduce framework.
